LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS AARON BLAISDELL AND KEISHA BROOKS' MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 18, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
